narrative:
Van Buren (precinct in Hancock County) has 652 registered voters, with 38.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 54.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 47.9 percentage points.
